ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Platypode Systems Pty Ltd (ABN 00 000 000 000) by Eucalypta Group Limited (ASX code: TBDX).

Compliance representations: Target complies with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and ASIC guidance on handling of MNPI; there are no unresolved APP breach notifications; Spam Act and CDR obligations are assessed as not triggered by the Target’s operations.
Financing: Buyer to arrange domestic debt facilities; supplier credit applications in the data room exclude consumer credit reports; closing conditioned on a solvency certificate and no MAC.
